# services.i2pd

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.i2pd`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.i2pd.address` | `null or string` | Your external IP or hostname. |
| `services.i2pd.addressbook.defaulturl` | `string` | AddressBook subscription URL for initial setup |
| `services.i2pd.addressbook.subscriptions` | `list of string` | AddressBook subscription URLs |
| `services.i2pd.bandwidth` | `null or signed integer` | Set a router bandwidth limit integer in KBps. If not set, {command}`i2pd` defaults to 32KBps. |
| `services.i2pd.dataDir` | `null or string` | Alternative path to storage of i2pd data (RI, keys, peer profiles, ...) |
| `services.i2pd.enable` | `boolean` | Enables I2Pd as a running service upon activation. Please read <https://i2pd.readthedocs.io/en/latest/> for further configuration help. |
| `services.i2pd.enableIPv4` | `boolean` | Whether to enable IPv4 connectivity. |
| `services.i2pd.enableIPv6` | `boolean` | Whether to enable IPv6 connectivity. |
| `services.i2pd.exploratory.inbound.length` | `signed integer` | Guaranteed minimum hops for exploratory tunnels. |
| `services.i2pd.exploratory.inbound.quantity` | `signed integer` | Number of simultaneous exploratory tunnels. |
| `services.i2pd.exploratory.outbound.length` | `signed integer` | Guaranteed minimum hops for exploratory tunnels. |
| `services.i2pd.exploratory.outbound.quantity` | `signed integer` | Number of simultaneous exploratory tunnels. |
| `services.i2pd.family` | `null or string` | Specify a family the router belongs to. |
| `services.i2pd.floodfill` | `boolean` | Makes your router a floodfill, that means what other routers will publish and get LeaseSets and RouterInfos on your router. |
| `services.i2pd.ifname` | `null or string` | Network interface to bind to. |
| `services.i2pd.ifname4` | `null or string` | IPv4 interface to bind to. |
| `services.i2pd.ifname6` | `null or string` | IPv6 interface to bind to. |
| `services.i2pd.inTunnels` | `attribute set of (submodule)` | Serve something on I2P network at port and delegate requests to address inPort. |
| `services.i2pd.inTunnels.<name>.accessList` | `list of string` | I2P nodes that are allowed to connect to this service. |
| `services.i2pd.inTunnels.<name>.address` | `string` | Bind address for ‹name› endpoint. |
| `services.i2pd.inTunnels.<name>.crypto.tagsToSend` | `signed integer` | Number of ElGamal/AES tags to send. |
| `services.i2pd.inTunnels.<name>.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable ‹name›. |
| `services.i2pd.inTunnels.<name>.inPort` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | Service port. Default to the tunnel's listen port. |
| `services.i2pd.inTunnels.<name>.inbound.length` | `signed integer` | Guaranteed minimum hops for ‹name› tunnels. |
| `services.i2pd.inTunnels.<name>.inbound.quantity` | `signed integer` | Number of simultaneous ‹name› tunnels. |
| `services.i2pd.inTunnels.<name>.keys` | `string` | Keyset used for tunnel identity. |
| `services.i2pd.inTunnels.<name>.name` | `string` | The endpoint name. |
| `services.i2pd.inTunnels.<name>.outbound.length` | `signed integer` | Guaranteed minimum hops for ‹name› tunnels. |
| `services.i2pd.inTunnels.<name>.outbound.quantity` | `signed integer` | Number of simultaneous ‹name› tunnels. |
| `services.i2pd.inTunnels.<name>.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | Bind port for ‹name› endpoint. |
| `services.i2pd.inTunnels.<name>.type` | `one of "server", "http", "irc", "udpserver"` | Tunnel type. |
| `services.i2pd.limits.coreSize` | `signed integer` | Maximum size of corefile in Kb (0 - use system limit). |
| `services.i2pd.limits.ntcpHard` | `signed integer` | Maximum number of active transit sessions. |
| `services.i2pd.limits.ntcpSoft` | `signed integer` | Threshold to start probabalistic backoff with ntcp sessions (default: use system limit). |
| `services.i2pd.limits.ntcpThreads` | `signed integer` | Maximum number of threads used by NTCP DH worker. |
| `services.i2pd.limits.openFiles` | `signed integer` | Maximum number of open files (0 - use system default). |
| `services.i2pd.limits.transittunnels` | `signed integer` | Maximum number of active transit sessions. |
| `services.i2pd.logCLFTime` | `boolean` | Whether to enable full CLF-formatted date and time to log. |
| `services.i2pd.logLevel` | `one of "debug", "info", "warn", "error"` | The log level. {command}`i2pd` defaults to "info" but that generates copious amounts of log messages. We default to "error" which is similar to the default log level of {command}`tor`. |
| `services.i2pd.nat` | `boolean` | Whether to enable NAT bypass. |
| `services.i2pd.netid` | `signed integer` | I2P overlay netid. |
| `services.i2pd.notransit` | `boolean` | Tells the router to not accept transit tunnels during startup. |
| `services.i2pd.ntcp` | `boolean` | Whether to enable ntcp. |
| `services.i2pd.ntcp2.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable NTCP2. |
| `services.i2pd.ntcp2.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | Port to listen for incoming NTCP2 connections (0=auto). |
| `services.i2pd.ntcp2.published` | `boolean` | Whether to enable NTCP2 publication. |
| `services.i2pd.ntcpProxy` | `null or string` | Proxy URL for NTCP transport. |
| `services.i2pd.outTunnels` | `attribute set of (submodule)` | Connect to someone as a client and establish a local accept endpoint |
| `services.i2pd.outTunnels.<name>.address` | `string` | Bind address for ‹name› endpoint. |
| `services.i2pd.outTunnels.<name>.crypto.tagsToSend` | `signed integer` | Number of ElGamal/AES tags to send. |
| `services.i2pd.outTunnels.<name>.destination` | `string` | Remote endpoint, I2P hostname or b32.i2p address. |
| `services.i2pd.outTunnels.<name>.destinationPort` | `null or 16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | Connect to particular port at destination. |
| `services.i2pd.outTunnels.<name>.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable ‹name›. |
| `services.i2pd.outTunnels.<name>.inbound.length` | `signed integer` | Guaranteed minimum hops for ‹name› tunnels. |
| `services.i2pd.outTunnels.<name>.inbound.quantity` | `signed integer` | Number of simultaneous ‹name› tunnels. |
| `services.i2pd.outTunnels.<name>.keys` | `string` | Keyset used for tunnel identity. |
| `services.i2pd.outTunnels.<name>.name` | `string` | The endpoint name. |
| `services.i2pd.outTunnels.<name>.outbound.length` | `signed integer` | Guaranteed minimum hops for ‹name› tunnels. |
| `services.i2pd.outTunnels.<name>.outbound.quantity` | `signed integer` | Number of simultaneous ‹name› tunnels. |
| `services.i2pd.outTunnels.<name>.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | Bind port for ‹name› endpoint. |
| `services.i2pd.outTunnels.<name>.type` | `one of "client", "udpclient"` | Tunnel type. |
| `services.i2pd.package` | `package` | The i2pd package to use. |
| `services.i2pd.port` | `null or 16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | I2P listen port. If no one is given the router will pick between 9111 and 30777. |
| `services.i2pd.precomputation.elgamal` | `boolean` | Whenever to use precomputated tables for ElGamal. {command}`i2pd` defaults to `false` to save 64M of memory (and looses some performance). We default to `true` as that is what most users want anyway. |
| `services.i2pd.proto.bob.address` | `string` | Bind address for bob endpoint. |
| `services.i2pd.proto.bob.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable bob. |
| `services.i2pd.proto.bob.name` | `string` | The endpoint name. |
| `services.i2pd.proto.bob.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | Bind port for bob endpoint. |
| `services.i2pd.proto.http.address` | `string` | Bind address for http endpoint. |
| `services.i2pd.proto.http.auth` | `boolean` | Whether to enable webconsole authentication. |
| `services.i2pd.proto.http.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable http. |
| `services.i2pd.proto.http.hostname` | `null or string` | Expected hostname for WebUI. |
| `services.i2pd.proto.http.name` | `string` | The endpoint name. |
| `services.i2pd.proto.http.pass` | `string` | Password for webconsole access. |
| `services.i2pd.proto.http.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | Bind port for http endpoint. |
| `services.i2pd.proto.http.strictHeaders` | `null or boolean` | Enable strict host checking on WebUI. |
| `services.i2pd.proto.http.user` | `string` | Username for webconsole access |
| `services.i2pd.proto.httpProxy.address` | `string` | Bind address for httpproxy endpoint. |
| `services.i2pd.proto.httpProxy.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable httpproxy. |
| `services.i2pd.proto.httpProxy.inbound.length` | `signed integer` | Guaranteed minimum hops for httpproxy tunnels. |
| `services.i2pd.proto.httpProxy.inbound.quantity` | `signed integer` | Number of simultaneous httpproxy tunnels. |
| `services.i2pd.proto.httpProxy.keys` | `null or string` | File to persist HTTPPROXY keys. |
| `services.i2pd.proto.httpProxy.latency.max` | `null or signed integer` | Max latency for tunnels. |
| `services.i2pd.proto.httpProxy.latency.min` | `null or signed integer` | Min latency for tunnels. |
| `services.i2pd.proto.httpProxy.name` | `string` | The endpoint name. |
| `services.i2pd.proto.httpProxy.outbound.length` | `signed integer` | Guaranteed minimum hops for httpproxy tunnels. |
| `services.i2pd.proto.httpProxy.outbound.quantity` | `signed integer` | Number of simultaneous httpproxy tunnels. |
| `services.i2pd.proto.httpProxy.outproxy` | `null or string` | Upstream outproxy bind address. |
| `services.i2pd.proto.httpProxy.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | Bind port for httpproxy endpoint. |
| `services.i2pd.proto.i2cp.address` | `string` | Bind address for i2cp endpoint. |
| `services.i2pd.proto.i2cp.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable i2cp. |
| `services.i2pd.proto.i2cp.name` | `string` | The endpoint name. |
| `services.i2pd.proto.i2cp.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | Bind port for i2cp endpoint. |
| `services.i2pd.proto.i2pControl.address` | `string` | Bind address for i2pcontrol endpoint. |
| `services.i2pd.proto.i2pControl.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable i2pcontrol. |
| `services.i2pd.proto.i2pControl.name` | `string` | The endpoint name. |
| `services.i2pd.proto.i2pControl.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | Bind port for i2pcontrol endpoint. |
| `services.i2pd.proto.sam.address` | `string` | Bind address for sam endpoint. |
| `services.i2pd.proto.sam.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable sam. |
| `services.i2pd.proto.sam.name` | `string` | The endpoint name. |
| `services.i2pd.proto.sam.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | Bind port for sam endpoint. |
| `services.i2pd.proto.socksProxy.address` | `string` | Bind address for socksproxy endpoint. |
| `services.i2pd.proto.socksProxy.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable socksproxy. |
| `services.i2pd.proto.socksProxy.inbound.length` | `signed integer` | Guaranteed minimum hops for socksproxy tunnels. |
| `services.i2pd.proto.socksProxy.inbound.quantity` | `signed integer` | Number of simultaneous socksproxy tunnels. |
| `services.i2pd.proto.socksProxy.keys` | `null or string` | File to persist SOCKSPROXY keys. |
| `services.i2pd.proto.socksProxy.latency.max` | `null or signed integer` | Max latency for tunnels. |
| `services.i2pd.proto.socksProxy.latency.min` | `null or signed integer` | Min latency for tunnels. |
| `services.i2pd.proto.socksProxy.name` | `string` | The endpoint name. |
| `services.i2pd.proto.socksProxy.outbound.length` | `signed integer` | Guaranteed minimum hops for socksproxy tunnels. |
| `services.i2pd.proto.socksProxy.outbound.quantity` | `signed integer` | Number of simultaneous socksproxy tunnels. |
| `services.i2pd.proto.socksProxy.outproxy` | `string` | Upstream outproxy bind address. |
| `services.i2pd.proto.socksProxy.outproxyEnable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable SOCKS outproxy. |
| `services.i2pd.proto.socksProxy.outproxyPort` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | Upstream outproxy bind port. |
| `services.i2pd.proto.socksProxy.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | Bind port for socksproxy endpoint. |
| `services.i2pd.reseed.file` | `null or string` | Full path to SU3 file to reseed from. |
| `services.i2pd.reseed.floodfill` | `null or string` | Path to router info of floodfill to reseed from. |
| `services.i2pd.reseed.proxy` | `null or string` | URL for reseed proxy, supports http/socks. |
| `services.i2pd.reseed.urls` | `list of string` | Reseed URLs. |
| `services.i2pd.reseed.verify` | `boolean` | Whether to enable SU3 signature verification. |
| `services.i2pd.reseed.zipfile` | `null or string` | Path to local .zip file to reseed from. |
| `services.i2pd.share` | `signed integer` | Limit of transit traffic from max bandwidth in percents. |
| `services.i2pd.ssu` | `boolean` | Whether to enable ssu. |
| `services.i2pd.ssu2.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable SSU2. |
| `services.i2pd.ssu2.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | Port to listen for incoming SSU2 connections (0=auto). |
| `services.i2pd.ssu2.published` | `boolean` | Whether to enable SSU2 publication. |
| `services.i2pd.trust.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable explicit trust options. |
| `services.i2pd.trust.family` | `null or string` | Router Family to trust for first hops. |
| `services.i2pd.trust.hidden` | `boolean` | Whether to enable router concealment. |
| `services.i2pd.trust.routers` | `list of string` | Only connect to the listed routers. |
| `services.i2pd.upnp.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable UPnP service discovery. |
| `services.i2pd.upnp.name` | `string` | Name i2pd appears in UPnP forwardings list. |
| `services.i2pd.websocket.address` | `string` | Bind address for websockets endpoint. |
| `services.i2pd.websocket.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable websockets. |
| `services.i2pd.websocket.name` | `string` | The endpoint name. |
| `services.i2pd.websocket.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | Bind port for websockets endpoint. |
| `services.i2pd.yggdrasil.address` | `null or string` | Your local yggdrasil address. Specify it if you want to bind your router to a particular address. |
| `services.i2pd.yggdrasil.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Yggdrasil. |
